content:
<!-- type: test-plan lang: markdown -->

### Existing Tests (already in source)

Redis unit tests in `crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/redis.rs`:
- `test_config_defaults` ‚Äî verifies `RedisBackendConfig::default()` values
- `test_key_generation` ‚Äî verifies `state_key`/`result_key` format (skips if Redis unavailable)
- `test_serialization` ‚Äî round-trip `TaskState` and `TaskResult` via serde_json

Redis integration tests (`#[ignore]`): `test_set_get_state`, `test_set_get_result`, `test_wait_for_result_success`, `test_wait_for_result_timeout`, `test_get_many`, `test_delete`, `test_health_check`

Ion unit tests in `crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/ion.rs`:
- `test_config_default` ‚Äî verifies `IonBackendConfig::default()` values
- `test_key_generation` ‚Äî verifies key prefix format

### New Tests to Add

#### Redis Backend ‚Äî Unit Tests (`crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/redis.rs`)

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| R1 | `test_config_custom` | RedisBackendConfig | custom url/prefix/ttl/pool_size are stored correctly |
| R2 | `test_config_serde_roundtrip` | RedisBackendConfig Serialize/Deserialize | `serde_json::to_string` ‚Üí `from_str` produces equal config |
| R3 | `test_ttl_seconds_with_custom` | `get_ttl_seconds` | `get_ttl_seconds(Some(Duration::from_secs(120)))` returns 120 |
| R4 | `test_ttl_seconds_default` | `get_ttl_seconds` | `get_ttl_seconds(None)` returns `default_ttl.as_secs()` |
| R5 | `test_clone` | Clone impl | cloned backend has same config values |

#### Redis Backend ‚Äî Integration Tests (`crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/redis.rs`, `#[ignore]`)

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| R6 | `test_set_get_metadata` | `set_metadata`/`get_metadata` | store JSON value, retrieve matches |
| R7 | `test_delete_metadata` | `delete_metadata` | after delete, `get_metadata` returns None |
| R8 | `test_get_metadata_not_found` | `get_metadata` | non-existent key returns `Ok(None)` |
| R9 | `test_get_many_empty` | `get_many` edge | empty slice input ‚Üí empty Vec output |
| R10 | `test_set_result_with_custom_ttl` | `set_result` TTL | set with `Some(Duration::from_secs(10))`, verify retrievable |
| R11 | `test_set_state_overwrite` | `set_state` idempotency | set Pending then Started, get returns Started |
| R12 | `test_delete_nonexistent` | `delete` edge | deleting non-existent task returns `Ok(())` |
| R13 | `test_get_state_not_found` | `get_state` edge | non-existent task returns `Ok(None)` |
| R14 | `test_get_result_not_found` | `get_result` edge | non-existent task returns `Ok(None)` |
| R15 | `test_wait_for_result_terminal_no_result` | `wait_for_result` edge | terminal state but no result key ‚Üí `TaskError::Backend` |
| R16 | `test_set_result_updates_state` | `set_result` side effect | after `set_result(Success)`, `get_state` returns `Some(Success)` |
| R17 | `test_metadata_complex_json` | `set_metadata` | store nested JSON object with arrays, retrieve matches |

#### Ion Backend ‚Äî Unit Tests (`crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/ion.rs`)

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| I1 | `test_config_custom` | IonBackendConfig | custom url/prefix/ttl/timeouts stored correctly |
| I2 | `test_config_default_ttl` | IonBackendConfig | `default_ttl` is `Some(Duration::from_secs(86400))` |
| I3 | `test_value_to_bytes_from_bytes` | `value_to_bytes` | `KvValue::Bytes(vec)` ‚Üí same bytes |
| I4 | `test_value_to_bytes_from_string` | `value_to_bytes` | `KvValue::String(s)` ‚Üí `s.as_bytes()` |
| I5 | `test_value_to_bytes_unexpected` | `value_to_bytes` | other variant ‚Üí `TaskError::Deserialization` |

#### Ion Backend ‚Äî Integration Tests (`crates/cclab-queue/src/backend/ion.rs`, `#[ignore]`)

| ID | Test | Covers | Assertion |
|----|------|--------|-----------|
| I6 | `test_ion_set_get_state` | `set_state`/`get_state` | round-trip TaskState through Ion |
| I7 | `test_ion_set_get_result` | `set_result`/`get_result` | round-trip TaskResult, verify task_id and state |
| I8 | `test_ion_delete` | `delete` | after delete, both state and result return None |
| I9 | `test_ion_get_many` | `get_many` | batch get with mix of existing/missing tasks |
| I10 | `test_ion_get_many_empty` | `get_many` edge | empty input ‚Üí empty output |
| I11 | `test_ion_wait_for_result_success` | `wait_for_result` | spawn completion after delay, poll returns result |
| I12 | `test_ion_wait_for_result_timeout` | `wait_for_result` | never-completing task ‚Üí `TaskError::Timeout` |
| I13 | `test_ion_health_check` | `health_check` | ping succeeds on connected backend |
| I14 | `test_ion_set_get_metadata` | `set_metadata`/`get_metadata` | store and retrieve JSON metadata |
| I15 | `test_ion_delete_metadata` | `delete_metadata` | after delete, returns None |
| I16 | `test_ion_set_result_updates_state` | `set_result` side effect | Ion impl calls `set_state` internally |
| I17 | `test_ion_get_state_not_found` | `get_state` edge | non-existent ‚Üí `Ok(None)` |
| I18 | `test_ion_get_result_not_found` | `get_result` edge | non-existent ‚Üí `Ok(None)` |
